tasks.step: Locate CLI entry and render(<App />) call sites
tasks.notes: Entry: bin/plug.js → src/index.js. render(<App />) at src/index.js:60 inside launchTui(). launchTui() called when no args or via 'plug tui' subcommand.

tasks.step: Add non-TTY early guard before render(<App />) with Claude-Code-aware message
tasks.notes: Guard added at top of launchTui() in src/index.js before resolveStdin() call. Exits 1 with exact message. --version unaffected (goes via program.parse()).

tasks.step: Tests: non-TTY invocation exits 1 with guard message; --version still works
tasks.notes: Added tests/tui/non-tty-guard.test.js: 3 tests (exit 1 + message, no Ink stack trace, --version unaffected). All 212 tests pass.

tasks.step: VERIFY Phase 1: npm test green; manual non-TTY + TTY smoke; commit+push 'fix: guard TUI against non-TTY stdin (#8)'
tasks.notes: npm test: 212 passed (23 files). Non-TTY sim: `node bin/plug.js < /dev/null` → exit=1 + guard message. --version: 1.1.0. TTY smoke (plug in real terminal): OUTSTANDING - requires user to verify in PowerShell/Windows Terminal.

tasks.step: Locate skill install writer, commands writer, and install manifest model
tasks.notes: Skill install writer: src/commands/install.js:155-179. Command install writer: same file, else branch. Install manifest: src/utils/tracker.js (trackInstall/getInstalled → .plugvault/installed.json). TUI Installed-tab path renderer: src/tui/screens/installed.jsx:250 (<Text dimColor>{pkg.path}</Text>). update.js:135-139 has same flat-path pattern — fixed in same pass.

tasks.step: Change skill destination to .claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md (mkdirSync recursive)
tasks.notes: In install.js: skill branch now resolves destPath = path.join(getClaudeSkillsDir(), pkgName, 'SKILL.md') with ensureDir. update.js fixed with identical per-skill subdir logic. Commands path untouched.

tasks.step: Update install manifest path field + TUI Installed tab path display
tasks.notes: Manifest path field is set from destPath in trackInstall — automatically correct after 2.2. TUI installed.jsx:250 reads pkg.path from manifest — no code change needed.

tasks.step: Legacy flat SKILL.md migration: parse name frontmatter, move if parseable, warn if not
tasks.notes: migrateLegacyFlatSkillFile() added to install.js. Reads SKILL.md, extracts frontmatter block with /^---\r?\n([\s\S]*?)\r?\n---/m, then name: with /^name:\s*(\S+)/m. Renames file to subdir, updates manifest. Non-parseable: warns + leaves alone.

tasks.step: Tests: fresh multi-skill install, legacy migration, unparseable-legacy-left-alone
tasks.notes: 3 new tests in tests/install.test.js: (a) 3-skill fresh install → 3 subdirs; (b) parseable legacy migration → file moved + trackInstall called with new path; (c) unparseable legacy → file left alone + warning logged. 215/215 tests pass.

tasks.step: VERIFY Phase 2: npm test green; manual install layout check; commit+push 'fix: install skills into per-skill subdirs (#10)'
tasks.notes: npm test: 215 passed (23 files). Automated: `node bin/plug.js < /dev/null` → exit=1 guard still fires (Phase 1 not regressed). `node bin/plug.js --version` → 1.1.0 (PR #7 not regressed). OUTSTANDING (requires real terminal): Installed-tab TUI path display; actual plug install in a PowerShell session to confirm on-disk layout; Claude Code skill-load check.
